seo.title: Building Content Generation with Semantic Kernel + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Semantic Kernel + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building content generation applications with Semantic Kernel enables powerful LLM orchestration for creating branded, fact-checked content at scale. However, plugin chaining, planners, and memory can introduce cascading errors, hallucinations, and inconsistencies that undermine brand voice and factual accuracy. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify brand consistency, factual accuracy, originality, tone, and SEO compliance in real-time.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Semantic Kernel
architectureOverview.description:
Semantic Kernel orchestrates content generation through plugins for research, drafting, brand voice enforcement, fact-checking, and SEO optimization. A planner sequences these plugins—e.g., research → draft → brand align → fact-check → SEO tune—while memory recalls brand guidelines and past content. The kernel filter pattern intercepts function results for Vex verification before final output.

Typical flow: User prompt triggers planner → plugins execute in sequence → Vex filter verifies each output → approved content returns to user. This ensures editorial standards across multi-step generation.

Vex integrates as a result filter, catching issues like hallucinated facts or off-brand tone before they propagate.

risks.name: Plugin chaining producing cascading errors
risks.description: Research plugin hallucinates facts → brand plugin reinforces wrong voice → SEO plugin amplifies errors
risks.mitigation: Vex filter on each plugin result prevents error propagation

risks.name: Planner generating invalid execution plans
risks.description: Planner sequences fact-check before research, causing verification of unverified data
risks.mitigation: Vex validates plan outputs and intermediate results

risks.name: Memory recall hallucinating past interactions
risks.description: Memory retrieves nonexistent brand guidelines, corrupting voice enforcement
risks.mitigation: Vex fact-checks memory retrievals against source documents

risks.name: Cross-plugin data contamination
risks.description: SEO keywords override brand tone in final draft
risks.mitigation: Vex enforces verification hierarchy across plugin outputs

implementation.title: Basic Content Generation Kernel Setup
implementation.description: Initialize Semantic Kernel with content generation plugins
implementation.code:
from semantic_kernel import Kernel
from semantic_kernel.connectors.ai.open_ai import OpenAIChatCompletion

kernel = Kernel()

# Brand voice plugin
brand_plugin = kernel.import_plugin_from_prompt_directory("plugins/brand_voice")

# Content generation with planner
planner = kernel.add_service(SequentialPlanner(kernel))
plan = await planner.create_plan(goal="Write blog post about AI ethics")
result = await plan.invoke_async()

vexIntegration.title: Python: Vex Filter on Kernel Function Results
vexIntegration.description: Add Vex as result filter to verify brand consistency and facts
vexIntegration.code:
from vex_sdk import VexClient
from semantic_kernel import KernelFunctionFilter

vex_client = VexClient(api_key="your-vex-key")

class VexContentFilter(KernelFunctionFilter):
    async def on_function_result(self, function_result, kernel):
        content = function_result.value
        
        # Vex verification for content generation
        verification = await vex_client.verify({
            "input": content,
            "policy": "content-generation",
            "checks": {
                "brand_consistency": "professional_tech",
                "factual_accuracy": "high",
                "tone_adherence": "optimistic",
                "seo_compliance": "essential",
                "originality": "medium"
            }
        })
        
        if not verification.passed:
            function_result.value = f"[REJECTED: {verification.issues}]"
        
        return function_result

# Register filter
kernel.register_function_result_filter(VexContentFilter())
